race_name: L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France

top_categories.workout_context: 68ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
At mile 60 of 82, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
At L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France. Train it until it feels boring.
L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France's paved roads through the Central Bohemian hills forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 82 miles.
5,577ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
5,577ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 82 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,577ft of climbing on paved roads through the Central Bohemian hills does to your power file on race day.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 82 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Tempo is L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 82 miles on paved roads through the Central Bohemian hills. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for L'Etape Czech Republic by Tour de France’s 82 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 82 miles of paved roads through the central bohemian hills in Prague and Central Bohemia Region, Czech Republic.
